understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through each KA59 level and win by placing every selectable piece onto the goal tile(s) marked '+' so that all goals are simultaneously occupied before the per-level step budget runs out.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The currently selected piece (shown as 'P' and identified by player.position/player.id) moves in 3-pixel grid-cell increments with MOVE_* actions; moves can be blocked by walls or other objects, and the movement.*_blocked flags only indicate adjacency (a hint), not guaranteed failure. Some adjacent objects (e.g., blocks) can be pushed if the selected piece moves into them and there is space for the pushed object to slide in the same direction; walls stop movement/pushing. If multiple selectables exist, control can be switched by CLICKing the exact pixel coordinates of another selectable from the objects list/semantic grid; incorrect coordinates or blocked selection attempts result in no change.
